secretaryOfState.agency: New Hampshire Department of State Corporation Division

hours.regular: Walk-in customers Monday-Friday 8:30 a.m.-4:00 p.m.; telephone information line Monday-Friday 8:00 a.m.-4:30 p.m.

physicalAddresses.label: Corporation Division
physicalAddresses.street: State House Annex, Room 317, 25 Capitol Street, 3rd Floor

mailingAddress.street: Corporation Division, N.H. Department of State, 107 North Main Street

renewals.notes: Annual reports are due by April 1 each year after registration and may be filed online through NH QuickStart or printed for mail filing; a $50 late fee applies after April 1.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Certificate of Formation is $100; online filings include New Hampshire's $2 electronic handling charge.
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Application for Reservation of Name is $15 and reserves the name for 120 days.
